reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed (code is live with caller at line 107, entry point is untrusted P2P peer, issue is Fusaka-specific and in-scope). An attacker can trigger this via P2P network by requesting blob_sidecars_by_range with a range spanning FULU_FORK_EPOCH, causing the handler to serve both pre-Fulu and post-Fulu blobs without epoch-based filtering, violating the protocol requirement that only pre-Fulu blobs should be served after the fork.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: SG-011: During transition, blob_sidecars_by_range must serve only pre-Fulu epoch blobs
